items.name: Add configurable `plugins.alerting.monitor.max_triggers` cluster setting to limit the number of triggers per monitor
Add Target object for external data source support on Monitor and Alert models
Set `cancelAfterTimeInterval` on all remaining `SearchRequest` constructions in monitor runners to prevent premature search cancellation
Limit verbose log output on scheduled migration cancellation to reduce log noise during index creation
Remove hardcoded trigger limit from Monitor data class and make trigger count per monitor configurable
Validate that api_type matches path in ClusterMetricsInput to prevent mismatched monitor configurations
Preserve user authentication context when stashing thread context during alert notification sending, fixing SMTP STARTTLS failures
Fix NullPointerException when nested field type has no properties in doc-level monitor creation
Replace `_id` sort with `_seq_no` in JobSweeper to fix fielddata error when `indices.id_field_data.enabled` is false
Fix acknowledge alerts modal to properly update table with acknowledged alerts instead of showing a stuck loading state
Fix broken anomaly detector monitor definition method in OpenSearch UI
Normalize cluster metrics input URI path during validation to fix exception when path lacks leading slash
Revert addition of Target object for external data source support on Monitor and Alert models
Replace `Thread.sleep` with `OpenSearchTestCase.waitUntil` in integration tests for more reliable test execution
Remove experimental PPL alerting feature assets pending refactoring for a future release
Inject SdkClient into transport actions for SDK persistence support
Integrate remote metadata SDK client with alerting plugin
Revert SdkClient changes merged during code freeze
Refactor PPL alerting APIs to use v1 endpoints
Remove legacy and PPL alerting separation
Add Terraform-based anomaly detection detector provisioning and lifecycle automation
Update Daily Insights page to support new insight-results schema
Update delete\_backport\_branch workflow to also clean up release-chores branches after merge
Add accept hypothesis feature
Add duration tracking for investigations, steps, and sub-steps
Add comprehensive telemetry metrics for investigation actions
Add max length limit for visualization summary image size
Allow log analysis to rerun during reinvestigation
Update investigation tool result style to align with chat
Show absolute time in reinvestigation time picker and enlarge modal for full text display
Update wording of investigation detail card and fix missing workspace in investigation URL
Increase summary agent timeout to 60 seconds and enhance error handling
Increase polling retry count for trace and step
Improve error handling for invalid PPL queries and fix investigation steps style
Fix hypothesis detail buttons placement
Remove duplicate confirm/reject buttons on finding
Fix wrong datasource ID being passed from chat
Fix chat integration type conflict to ensure correct chat instance is used
Support manually creating a Query Set using plain text, key-value, or NDJSON input directly in the UI.
Add Help flyout for Query Set creation with format documentation and downloadable sample files.
Support multiple datasource in SRW
Show a dismissible UI element to guide users to the relevance tuning agent if the chat plugin is enabled.
Proper support of .ndjson or .jsonl for Query Sets file uploads.
Add resizable query editor boxes with drag handles for vertical expansion in Query Compare view.
Standardize Action button tooltips across all listing pages (Search Configurations, Experiments, Judgments, Query Sets) using `EuiToolTip` for improved UX and accessibility.
Remove milliseconds from timestamp display format across all listing tables.
Change Single Query Comparison to Query Analysis
Fix scheduler failure when cron expression is null or empty in SRW experiments by adding proper validation and handling.
Fix text alignment and excessive spacing in Query Analysis results view.
Allow a single query setup to be executed in the search comparison UI.
Fix error when deleting judgment ratings by ensuring the judgments list refreshes correctly and removes deleted entries from UI state.
Fix generic error message when uploading malformed NDJSON query sets by surfacing detailed parsing error with line numbers.
Add lookback window frontend support for PPL/SQL monitors
Introduce V2 Chat Agent with unified interface, multi-modal support, and simplified registration
Add semantic and hybrid search APIs for long-term memory retrieval in agentic memory
Add token usage tracking for Conversational, AG_UI, and Plan-Execute-Reflect agents
Support messages array in all memory types and chat history in AGUI agent
Add post-memory hook with structured message support for context managers
Add more detailed logging to Agent Workflow to enable debugging and metric collection
Allow overwrite during execute for inline create context management during agent register
Restore AGUI context for legacy interface agent
Escape tool name and description to handle quotation marks properly
Fix LLM customized prompt template
Fix RestChatAgentIT teardown failure when AWS credentials are absent
Fix agent\_id parameter conflict by renaming to agent\_id\_log for logging to prevent infinite loop in AgentTool
Fix MCP connector setting not being respected for Agent V2
Fix incorrect error codes when deleting memory containers and context management templates
Fix error code for delete context management template API to return 404 instead of 500
Fix context restoration bug where user information was missing
Fix unsupported operation issue when putting agent ID into immutable map
Add LAST_TOKEN pooling implementation for text embedding models used by decoder-only models
Add NONE pooling mode to support pre-pooled model outputs without redundant pooling computation
Add support for custom fallback query in QueryPlanningTool for agentic search
Support aliases and wildcard index patterns in QueryPlanningTool
[Agentic Search]: Support embedding model id in agentic query translator processor for neural queries
Improve EncryptorImpl with asynchronous handling for scalability and fix duplicate master key generation
Add helper method for Nova clean request
Override ValidatingObjectInputStream.resolveClass() to support plugin classloader fallback
Fix SdkAsyncHttpClient resource leak in connector executors causing connection pool exhaustion
Fix Tags.addTag() return value not captured after immutable Tags change, causing tags to be silently dropped
Fix connection\_timeout and read\_timeout defaults from 30000 to 30 to match seconds unit
Fix numeric type preservation in ML inference query template substitution
Fix early exit in stats collector job when a connector is fetched for model details
Fix error handling to use OpenSearchException instead of OpenSearchStatusException for broader 4XX client error coverage
Fix Cohere integration test timeouts by increasing timeout to 120s and adding reachability checks
Prevent SearchModelGroupITTests timeout by disabling dedicated masters and fix Bedrock connection pool exhaustion
Add shard operations collector and optimized node stats collector
Fix CVE-2025-68161 by force resolving log4j dependencies
Disable dependencyLicenses check to align with other plugin repos
Add RemoteRepositoryExporter to support exporting top N queries to remote blob store repositories
Add recommendation data models for rule-based recommendation engine
Add shard-level task details to the live queries API for full distributed search visibility
Add streaming dimension to query categorization metrics
Implement access control for query insights data with username and backend role filtering
Add rule-based recommendation service for analyzing search queries with actionable suggestions
Track failed queries by tagging them with a failed attribute
Add finished queries cache to the live queries API for retrieving recently completed searches
Add visualizations to Top N Queries page including P90/P99 stats, queries by node/index/user/WLM group pie charts, and performance analysis line charts
Add heatmap visualization, interactive pie charts, collapsible sections, and sorting/pagination to Top N Queries page
Switch latency graphs from Plotly to React ECharts for consistency
Fix IS\_STREAMING\_TAG not propagated in incrementAggCounter due to immutable Tags object
Fix MultiIndexDateRangeIT test failure
Fix exporter retry logic for MapperParsingException by moving detection to onResponse callback
Fix grouping field\_name/field\_type settings being overwritten to false on initialization
Enable internalClusterTest and yamlRestTest tasks and fix uncovered test issues
Exclude RemoteRepositoryExporterIT and TopQueriesRbacIT from integTestRemote
Fix integTestRemote task spinning up unnecessary test cluster nodes by changing task type
Revert cluster health check before running integration tests
Add cluster health check before running integration tests to prevent connection failures
Pin LocalStack version to v4.4 and increase health check timeout for CI stability
Remove flaky verbose=false API schema test from Cypress that was failing due to timing sensitivity
Use poll-based check in Cypress beforeEach for improved test reliability
Pin Gradle wrapper version in Cypress workflows to prevent Gradle 9.x download and fix related CI issues
Add optional name and description fields to experiments
Introduced dynamic percentile-based relevance thresholding for binary-dependent metrics (Precision, MAP) to replace hard-coded `j > 0` mapping
Added additional search evaluation metrics: Recall@K, Mean Reciprocal Rank (MRR), and Discounted Cumulative Gain (DCG@K)
Allow demo scripts to be run from any directory and point to any OpenSearch server.
Fixed thread pool starvation in LLM judgment processing
Fix flaky DCG and MRR assertions in integration tests
Extract reusable BatchedAsyncExecutor; migrate LlmJudgmentTaskManager and ExperimentTaskManager to use it
Enable basic authentication for gRPC transport
Allow specifying parent type and parent ID field in ResourceProvider for parent-child resource authorization
Optimize getFieldFilter to only return a predicate when an index has FLS restrictions for the user
Optimize string matching for RoleBasedActionPrivileges with prefix and exact pattern matching
Harden input validation for resource sharing APIs
Make encryption_key optional for on-behalf-of token authenticator
Allow specifying default access level in resource access levels YAML file
Use custom action prefixes for sample resource plugin
Make security plugin aware of FIPS build parameter for BouncyCastle FIPS jar handling
Use html2canvas-pro with CSP nonce to fix content security policy violation
Fix CVE-2025-13465 security vulnerability
Fix CVE-2025-15284 security vulnerability
Fix CVE-2026-2739 security vulnerability
Stop fetching security snapshot artifacts in non-snapshot builds
Renamed resource-action-groups.yml to resource-access-levels.yml to fix security checks
Fix propagation issue for security context
Fix audit log writing errors for rollover-enabled alias indices
Fix unprocessed X-Request-Id header in security plugin
Fix audit log NONE sentinel value not respected in dynamic configuration and misleading unknown setting error
Improve error message for DLS queries referencing undefined user attributes
Rename resource-action-groups.yml to resource-access-levels.yml to fix security checks
Replace java.security.AccessController with org.opensearch.secure\_sm.AccessController
Add SearchAroundTool to search N documents around a given document
Add MetricChangeAnalysisTool for detecting and analyzing metric changes via percentile comparison between baseline and selection periods
Add filter support for LogPatternAnalysisTool to enable log pattern analysis for specific services
Update default tool descriptions for LogPatternAnalysisTool and DataDistributionTool to improve clarity for LLM usage
Add 1-bit compression support for the Lucene Scalar Quantizer (BBQ integration)
Add Faiss Scalar Quantization 1-bit support with memory-optimized search, SIMD acceleration, and codec integration
Add support for Lucene BBQ Flat format with 1-bit (32x) compression
Fix default encoder to SQ 1-bit for Faiss 32x compression
Add support for pre-quantized vector exact search to avoid redundant quantization during queries
Use pre-quantized vectors for Asymmetric Distance Computation (ADC) to improve search performance
Add Hamming distance scorer for byte vectors to support memory-optimized binary vector search
Add NestedBestChildVectorScorer and KnnBinaryDocValuesScorer for exact search when Lucene's built-in scorers are unavailable
Add prefetch functionality for vectors during ANN search in memory-optimized search
Add scorer-aware ByteVectorValues wrapper for FAISS index to enable scoring with external iterator support
Introduce VectorScorers factory to create VectorScorer instances based on underlying vector storage format
Refactor ExactSearcher to use Lucene's VectorScorer API with batch scoring instead of ExactKNNIterator
Optimize ByteVectorIdsExactKNNIterator by moving float-to-byte array conversion to constructor
Fix FaissIdMap to honor given acceptOrds for sparse case by removing double ordinal-to-docID mapping
Fix radial search returning 0 results for IndexHNSWCagra by adding proper range\_search override
Fix score conversion logic for filtered radial exact search with cosine space type
Fix Lucene reduce to topK when rescoring is enabled, preventing premature result reduction before rescoring phase
Support aborting native engine merges to prevent shard relocation and cluster stability issues
Fix k-NN build and run compatibility with Lucene 10.4.0 upgrade
Update changelog
Fix KNN1030Codec to properly support delegation for non-default codecs on the read path
Simplify DerivedSourceReaders lifecycle by removing manual ref-counting and aligning with Lucene's ownership model
Integrate prefetch with FP16-based index for memory-optimized search
Integrate prefetch for SparseFloatVectorValues with Faiss indices
Decouple native SIMD scoring selection from FaissMemoryOptimizedSearcher into FlatVectorsScorer decorator
Speed up FP16 bulk similarity by precomputing the tail mask, yielding up to 35% performance gain
Use correct vector scorer when segments are initialized via SPI and correct maxConn for memory-optimized search
Fix random entry point generation for CagraIndex in memory-optimized search when numVectors is less than entryPoints
Fix optimistic search bugs on nested Cagra index including duplicate entry points and incorrect second deep-dive behavior
Fix prefetch failure due to out-of-bound exception in FaissScorableByteVectorValues
Fix integer overflow for memory-optimized search when converting Faiss HNSW offsets from long to int
Adjust merge policy settings to make merges less aggressive, reducing CPU impact during concurrent search and indexing
Improve unit tests by tightening assertions
Fix derived source with dynamic templates causing vectors to be incorrectly returned during bulk indexing
Update mend config to allow remediation
Add unified query parser API
Add profiling support to unified query API
Add Calcite native SQL planning in UnifiedQueryPlanner
Add query cancellation support via _tasks/_cancel API for PPL queries
Support graphLookup with literal value as its start

Support creating/updating prometheus rules
Change the final output result of struct from list to map
added cloudwatch style contains operator
Update graphlookup syntax

Add grammar bundle generation API for PPL language features
Support PPL queries when having trailing pipes and/or empty pipes

fieldformat command implementation

Fix the bug when boolean comparison condition is simplifed to field

Add bitmap64 query support

Implement field_mapping ingestion message mapper for pull-based ingestion

Remove experimental tag for pull-based ingestion, marking it as public API
